narrative:
Columbia Twp. township has 3,430 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.5 percentage points.
